description: CompositionWhite jacket and black trackpants made of lightweight knit tri-cotton fabric, full front zipper, stand up collar, elastic cuffs and waist, and on-seam pockets with contrast stripes along side arms and legsWash careHand wash or machine washVery original in its style, this men& rsquo s tracksuit from adidas is designed in soft and lightweight knit tricot fabric with contrast stripes and embroidered brandmark. The full front zipper on the jacket, stand up collar and elastic cuffs and waist render it a stylish and user friendly outfit. The broad elastic waistband and side pockets make it an ideal exercise or morning walk jersey.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-19" White jacket and black trackpants made of lightweight knit tri-cotton fabric, full front zipper, stand up collar, elastic cuffs and waist, and on-seam pockets with contrast stripes along side arms and legs
